name: 6-DOF Robotic Arm (RA-6D)
description: A versatile 6 degrees-of-freedom robotic arm capable of precise positioning and orientation control. Ideal for pick-and-place, assembly, and welding tasks.

name: Delta Robot (DR-3P)
description: A high-speed parallel delta robot optimised for rapid pick-and-place operations on conveyor belts and packaging lines.

name: SCARA Arm (SC-4A)
description: A 4-axis SCARA (Selective Compliance Assembly Robot Arm) designed for high-speed horizontal assembly and insertion tasks.

name: Collaborative Robot Arm (CR-7)
description: A lightweight collaborative robot (cobot) with built-in force sensing for safe human-robot interaction. Suitable for shared workspaces.

name: Differential Drive Wheeled Base (WB-D2)
description: A compact two-wheeled differential drive mobile base with caster wheels for indoor navigation. Supports payloads up to 50 kg.

name: Tracked Mobile Base (TB-H4)
description: A heavy-duty tracked mobile base designed for rough terrain and outdoor environments. Can traverse uneven surfaces and slopes.

name: Mecanum Wheel Base (MW-O4)
description: An omnidirectional mobile base using four mecanum wheels, allowing movement in any direction without turning. Perfect for tight spaces.

name: Raspberry Pi 5 Controller
description: A versatile single-board computer suitable for lightweight robotics control, sensor processing, and network communication.

name: NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano
description: A powerful AI edge computing module with a dedicated GPU, ideal for real-time computer vision, deep learning inference, and autonomous navigation.

name: Aluminium Extrusion Frame Kit (AF-30)
description: A modular aluminium extrusion frame kit (30x30 mm profile) for building custom robot structures. Lightweight and easy to assemble.

name: Steel Welded Frame (SF-H1)
description: A heavy-duty welded steel frame designed for industrial robot installations. Provides rigid mounting for high-payload applications.

name: LiPo Battery Pack (BP-24V)
description: A 24V lithium polymer battery pack providing reliable portable power for mobile robots and medium-duty applications.

name: Industrial Power Supply Unit (PSU-48V)
description: A 48V industrial-grade power supply unit for stationary robot installations. Features overcurrent protection and high efficiency.

name: Arduino Mega 2560 Controller
description: A microcontroller board ideal for low-level motor control, sensor reading, and real-time I/O operations in robotics projects.
